mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_carbon_emission ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_carbon_emission WHERE source_name LIKE '%' + #{sourceName} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_carbon_emission WHERE source_name LIKE '%' + #{sourceName} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_carbon_emission WHERE scope = #{scope} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_carbon_emission WHERE scope = #{scope}
SELECT * FROM tb_carbon_emission ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN scope = 1 THEN co2_emission END), 0) AS scope1Total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN scope = 2 THEN co2_emission END), 0) AS scope2Total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN scope = 3 THEN co2_emission END), 0) AS scope3Total, COALESCE(SUM(co2_emission), 0) AS yearTotal FROM tb_carbon_emission
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_carbon_emission (record_date, source_name, scope, energy_usage, energy_unit, co2_emission, factor_id, manager, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{sourceName}, #{scope}, #{energyUsage}, #{energyUnit}, #{co2Emission}, #{factorId}, #{manager}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_carbon_emission SET record_date = #{recordDate}, source_name = #{sourceName}, scope = #{scope}, energy_usage = #{energyUsage}, energy_unit = #{energyUnit}, co2_emission = #{co2Emission}, factor_id = #{factorId}, manager = #{manager}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
